description: Default production case pack for Phase 12. Run 1-2 cases at a time.

cases.topic: vay tiền mặt ở shin han
cases.focus: Shinhan cash loan customer experience and interest rates
cases.audience: Tap trung vao trai nghiem that, muc lai suat, dieu kien vay, va so sanh voi ngan hang khac cua khach hang da vay hoac da nop ho so.
cases.comparison_policy: Ghi nhan so sanh voi Agribank, ACB, Vietcombank, Techcombank, BIDV, MB Bank, va Sacombank neu giup ly giai trai nghiem vay cua Shinhan.
cases.default_answer: Tap trung vao trai nghiem that, muc lai suat, dieu kien vay, va so sanh voi ngan hang khac cua khach hang da vay hoac da nop ho so.
cases.expectation: Case nay dung de xac nhan zero-evidence run van co final no-answer outcome thay vi chi dung o NO_ELIGIBLE_RECORDS.

cases.topic: Suy nghi cua khach hang ve vay nhanh tien mat qua FE Credit
cases.focus: FE Credit vay nhanh tien mat
cases.audience: Tap trung vao feedback that ve trust, complaint, phi, lai suat, va trai nghiem vay tien mat qua FE Credit tai Viet Nam.
cases.comparison_policy: Ghi nhan so sanh voi Home Credit, Shinhan Finance, hoac don vi cho vay khac neu giup ly giai trust, phi, hoac trai nghiem vay, nhung uu tien feedback that ve FE Credit.
cases.default_answer: Tap trung vao feedback that ve trust, complaint, phi, lai suat, va trai nghiem vay tien mat qua FE Credit tai Viet Nam.
cases.expectation: Case nay dung de dam bao Phase 12 khong lam regress duong ANSWER_READY da duoc production-prove.
